free_text: Main reference. See also TITLE and AUTHOR.
Mass distr. and data for Bi-209(g,f)
Beam intensity: 1e+09 to 1e+10 equivalent quanta per
By internal target of Pt with 50 micro-meter
- Chemical-form of target: Bi or Bi2O3
- Target-thickness: 970 mg/cm2 and 1.6 g/cm2 for Bi
Stack of 5 sets of Au foil sandwiched by one
Fe, Y, Ag, Ba, Ga, Sr, Zr, As, Br, Nb, I
Authors give yield with unit of [micro-barn/equivalent

On. Received by e-mail from H.Haba
